headline: Shares of U.S.-listed foreign banks are trading higher amid subdued energy prices and inflation concerns after President Trump suspended U.S. strikes on Iranian power generation and energy assets for five days.
summary: Shares of U.S.-listed foreign banks are trading higher amid subdued energy prices and inflation concerns after President Trump suspended U.S. strikes on Iranian power generation and energy assets for five days.

raw.headline: Shares of U.S.-listed foreign banks are trading higher amid subdued energy prices and inflation concerns after President Trump suspended U.S. strikes on Iranian power generation and energy assets for five days.

headline: Truist Financial Analyst Turns Bearish After CEO Shakeup
summary: TFC's decision to hire an external CEO signals risk to near-term outlook and a strategy reset, says BofA analyst Ebrahim Poonawala.

raw.headline: Truist Financial Analyst Turns Bearish After CEO Shakeup
